# CH224A Breakout — Attribution

These KiCad 10 project files are taken from the
[CH224A-breakout](https://github.com/uwrealitylabs/CH224A-breakout) project
by [UW Reality Labs](https://github.com/uwrealitylabs), used here as a
benchmark reference for validating KiCad Studio features against a
real-world board design.

| Field         | Value                                                                |
| ------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Source        | https://github.com/uwrealitylabs/CH224A-breakout                     |
| Author        | UW Reality Labs                                                      |
| License       | See upstream repository                                              |
| KiCad version | 10.0                                                                 |
| Files         | `CH224A breakout board design.kicad_sch`, `.kicad_pcb`, `.kicad_pro` |
